creator: legioner.r@gmail.com
text:
After install freebsd 7.0 I've received random fails:
At start - something like "init: cannot run /bin/sh for /etc/rc:
invalid exec format".
After successful boot - services and other executables coredumps random.


memtest - no errors
HDD - new, without BB.
6.2 has worked with no problems on this machine a half-year

pciconf -l:
atapci0@pci0:4:0:       class=0x01018a card=0x72501462 chip=0x036e10de rev=0xa1 hdr=0x00
atapci1@pci0:5:0:       class=0x010185 card=0x72501462 chip=0x037f10de rev=0xa3 hdr=0x00
atapci2@pci0:5:1:       class=0x010185 card=0x72501462 chip=0x037f10de rev=0xa3 hdr=0x00
atapci3@pci0:5:2:       class=0x010185 card=0x72501462 chip=0x037f10de rev=0xa3 hdr=0x00

How-To-Repeat: Install 7.0 on computer with mcp55
